subcodes.first_line: O Divine friends, ye who are intoxicated with the wine of heavenly knowledge! That which was written hath been read [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی و مخموران باده عرفان یزدانی آنچه مرقوم شده بود قرائت گردید روح
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
